creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to John from comment #18)

What're issues, you discovered in xfce4-screensaver? I daily use this application and nothing noticed something wrong. 

Currently there is no "priority" in screensaver for the Xfce session, so you must choose one of them (and not both!)
- xscreensaver
- xfce4-screensaver
